sentences.sentence: Rental contracts are signed at this desk.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-cts in contracts); word-final consonants (desk, signed)

sentences.sentence: Keys are kept behind the counter.
sentences.phonetic_focus: word-final consonants (keys, kept); stress on compound-like phrase (the counter)

sentences.sentence: Please present your driving permit here.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-nt in present, permit); linking (present_your)

sentences.sentence: Compact cars are parked in the front lot.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress placement in compound noun (front lot); consonant clusters (-ct in compact, -kt in parked)

sentences.sentence: Fuel costs are added to your final receipt.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-lts in costs, -pt in receipt); linking (added_to)

sentences.sentence: You can return the vehicle to any nearby branch.
sentences.structure: declarative with direct address and prepositional phrase
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-rn in return, -nch in branch); reduced function words (to any)

sentences.sentence: If you are unsure which model suits you, check the schedule posted near the main entrance.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary (if you_are, suits_you); stress-timing across 16 words; consonant clusters (-ts in suits, -le in schedule)

sentences.sentence: Study rooms are located upstairs.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress placement in compound noun (study rooms); consonant cluster (str- in study)

sentences.sentence: Return your books at the front desk.
sentences.phonetic_focus: word-final consonants (books, desk); stress in compound noun (front desk)

sentences.sentence: Current journals are shelved along the east wall.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-nt in current, -lved in shelved); linking (along_the)

sentences.sentence: Printing accounts are reloaded automatically each Wednesday.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables (automatically, Wednesday); consonant clusters (-nts in accounts)

sentences.sentence: Reserved materials can be collected from the help desk.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-rved in reserved, -lp in help); linking (can_be)

sentences.sentence: Group discussions are permitted only in the lower level.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-ssions in discussions, -tted in permitted); reduced syllables (permitted)

sentences.sentence: If you cannot find a title on the shelves, check the catalog at the nearest terminal.
sentences.phonetic_focus: conditional intonation (rising if-clause, falling main); reduced function words (on the, at the); final clusters (-nd in find, -lves in shelves)

sentences.sentence: Restrooms are located near the lobby.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-str in restrooms); word-final consonants (lobby, near)

sentences.sentence: The dome projector displays tonight's constellations.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-cts in projects/displays, -nts in constellations); reduced syllables (constellations)

sentences.sentence: Reclining seats are arranged in concentric circles.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-ning in reclining, -ts in seats); reduced syllables (concentric)

sentences.sentence: The evening show begins automatically at eight o'clock.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables (automatically, evening); consonant clusters (-gins in begins)

sentences.sentence: Telescopes for public viewing are mounted on the rooftop.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-pes in telescopes, -nted in mounted); reduced function words (for public)

sentences.sentence: Star charts for each season are stacked by the exit.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-rts in charts, -ck in stacked); reduced function words (for each, by the)

sentences.sentence: Before the lights go down, take a moment to find the emergency exits along the side aisles.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced function words in rapid sequence (to find the, along the); final consonant clusters at phrase boundaries (-nts in moment, -ts in exits, -les in aisles)
